value.fullName: YES - I understand the minimum insurance requirements listed above are required during the agreement / assignment period. I am willing to obtain this insurance if I am engaged on a project.
value.label: YES - I understand the minimum insurance requirements listed above are required during the agreement / assignment period. I am willing to obtain this insurance if I am engaged on a project.

value.fullName: NO - I do not agree to the insurance requirements.
value.label: NO - I do not agree to the insurance requirements.

value.fullName: Unsure, I need to better understand the cost to determine if I am willing to obtain this insurance. (If you select this response you will need to be prepared to obtain insurance and provide a COI to complete phase 2.)
value.label: Unsure, I need to better understand the cost to determine if I am willing to obtain this insurance. (If you select this response you will need to be prepared to obtain insurance and provide a COI to complete phase 2.)
